title: rubus horstensis
intro: Rubus horstensis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Indian raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to the Himalayan region and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Rubus horstensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as a natural digestive aid, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
